jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at FreshToHome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, FreshToHome in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About FreshToHome:
FreshToHome is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome!
